Your diary date (if set) and watched status for this film remain publicly visible. Ratings on Close Friends and You entries don’t contribute to stats. Add members to your Close Friends from their profile. Set your account default for Privacy mode in Settings.

Draft entries don’t appear in your watched films or diary for others, and don’t contribute to your stats.

Where to watch

Trailer

  JustWatch

Spirited Away

2001

千と千尋の神隠し

Directed by Hayao Miyazaki

Synopsis

A young girl, Chihiro, becomes trapped in a strange new world of spirits. When her parents undergo a mysterious transformation, she must call upon the courage she never knew she had to free her family.

  • Cast
  • Crew
  • Details
  • Genres
  • Releases

Cast

Rumi Hiiragi Miyu Irino Mari Natsuki Takashi Naito Yasuko Sawaguchi Tatsuya Gashûin Ryunosuke Kamiki Yumi Tamai Yo Oizumi Koba Hayashi Tsunehiko Kamijô Takehiko Ono Bunta Sugawara Shigeru Wakita Shirou Saitou Michiko Yamamoto Keiko Tsukamoto Akio Nakamura Shinji Tokumaru Kaori Yamagata Tsuzuki Kayako Masahiro Asano Kazutaka Hayashida Ikuko Yamamoto Mina Meguro Tetsurô Ishibashi Katsutomo Shîbara Shinobu Katabuchi Noriko Kitou Show All… Naoto Kaji Yoshitaka Sukegawa Aki Tachikawa Noriko Yamaya Katsuhisa Matsuo Masayuki Kizu Yôko Ôno Sachie Azuma Ken Yasuda Shigeyuki Totsugi Mayumi Saco Sonoko Soeda Akiko Tomihira Minako Masuda Orika Ono Rina Yamada Miwa Takachi Hiromi Takeuchi Makiko Oku

Director Director

Hayao Miyazaki

Producer Producer

Toshio Suzuki

Writer Writer

Hayao Miyazaki

Original Writer Original Writer

Editor Editor

Cinematography Cinematography

Atsushi Okui

Assistant Directors Asst. Directors

Atsushi Takahashi Masayuki Miyaji

Additional Directing Add. Directing

Kitaro Kosaka Masashi Ando Megumi Kagawa Mitsunori Kataama

Executive Producers Exec. Producers

Yasuyoshi Tokuma Koji Hoshino Hironori Aihara Yutaka Narita Banjiro Uemura Takeyoshi Matsushita Seiichiro Ujiie

Art Direction Art Direction

Yoji Takeshige Noboru Yoshida

Composers Composers

Joe Hisaishi Youmi Kimura

Songs Songs

Youmi Kimura

Sound Sound

Shuji Inoue

Studios

Studio Ghibli Tokuma Shoten Nippon Television Network Corporation Mitsubishi dentsu TFC

Country

Japan

Language

Japanese

Alternative Titles

Sen to Chihiro no Kamikakushi, Unesenniye prizrakami, Chihiro ilmmiid gaskkas, El viatge de Chihiro, Shahr Ashbah, 千與千尋, Ruhların Qaçışı, Sen gwa Chihiro ui Haengbang Bulmyeong, Shahre Ashbah, Shahr-e Ashbah, The Spiriting Away of Sen and Chihiro, Vùng đất linh hồn, המסע המופלא, 神隐少女, Ուրվականներից քշվածները, Urvakanneric Crvatsnery, 센과 치히로의 행방불명, El viaje de Chihiro, Miyazaki's Spirited Away, A Viagem de Chihiro, Le Voyage de Chihiro, Chihiros Reise ins Zauberland, Chihiro Szellemországban, 千与千寻, Henkien kätkemä, La città incantata, Унесённые призраками, Chihiro og heksene, Spirited Away: W krainie Bogów, Cesta do fantazie, Ruhların Kaçışı, Ταξίδι στη Χώρα των Θαυμάτων, Gariem līdzi, Віднесені привидами, Отнесени от духове, 神隱少女, มิติวิญญาณมหัศจรรย์, Зачарани град, Cesta do fantázie, La vojaĝo de Ĉihiro, شهر اشباح, Avanture Male Chihiro, Călătoria lui Chihiro, Stebuklingi Šihiros nuotykiai Dvasių pasaulyje, المخطوفة, Vùng Đất Linh Hồn, Čudežno potovanje, स्पिरिटेड अवे, Chihiroren Bidaia, Скрадзеныя прывідамі, Vaimudest viidud, მოჩვენებებით გატაცებულნი, Le voyage de Chihiro

Genres

Family Fantasy Animation

Themes

Humanity and the world around us Emotional and captivating fantasy storytelling Fairy-tale fantasy and enchanted magic Adorable animals and heartwarming families Kids' animated fun and adventure Surreal and thought-provoking visions of life and death Show All…

Review by 🌻 lindsay 🌻 22

I got lost in a department store when I was 5 and it felt a lot like this

Translated from by
Review by andrea🌹 10

This review may contain spoilers. I can handle the truth.

wish my bf was a river

Translated from by
Review by David Sims 81

I mean, probably the best movie ever made?

Translated from by
Review by Karsten 210

no disrespect to totoro but what planet was i on when i said that was the best ghibli film

Translated from by
Review by James (Schaffrillas) 52

If I could give this movie 6 stars I would

Translated from by
Review by jaewon 238

When Chihiro was eating rice balls and crying... I felt that

Translated from by
Review by ksenija

honestly chihiro’s growth in this movie........... her courage..... how it even transforms her body language....... in the beginning she hunches in on herself and makes herself as small as possible and always looks to others for answers and safety.... and at the end she’s not hiding within herself anymore.... her voice is strong and clear...... love that for her

Translated from by
Review by JoshuaPictures 1

It was fine I guess

Translated from by
Review by Lucy 31

maybe definitely the best animated film of all time

Translated from by
Review by matt lynch 1

Fear traps you inside yourself.

Also: the cute little bird and the fat baby mouse thing? I'm not made of stone.

Translated from by
Review by ˗ˏˋ suspirliam ˊˎ˗ 19

u ever just wanna live in a movie bc same

Translated from by
Review by ☆ sophie ☆ 31

to those who rated this lower than a 4: you WILL be turned into pigs

Letterboxd is an independent service created by a small team, and we rely mostly on the support of our members to maintain our site and apps. Please consider upgrading to a Pro account—for less than a couple bucks a month, you’ll get cool additional features like all-time and annual stats pages (example), the ability to select (and filter by) your favorite streaming services, and no ads!
